data.acceptance:
1. A `homebrew-thimble` repo exists with a `Formula/thimble.rb`.
2. Release workflow updates the formula on each release with the new version and SHA-256s for darwin/amd64 and darwin/arm64.
3. `brew install cartine/thimble/thimble` works on a clean macOS image and produces a binary that passes `thimble --version`.
4. README "Install" section adds the brew one-liner above the curl one.
